articles.title: Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition Leaked
articles.description: Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition has leaked on the Xbox store, promising 4K resolution and 60 FPS. Ubisoft calls it the definitive experience for fans.
articles.impact: This leak builds anticipation for the release.

articles.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Launches on Switch 2
articles.description: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will launch simultaneously on Switch 2, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC. The campaign will be single-player only.
articles.impact: This marks a significant expansion for the franchise.

articles.title: TP-Link Announces Wi-Fi 8 Router Launch
articles.description: TP-Link plans to launch its first Wi-Fi 8 router, the Archer 8, in October. This will kick off a new line of Wi-Fi 8 products.

articles.title: New AC Cobra Coupe Unveiled at $537,000
articles.description: The new AC Cobra coupe is priced at $537,000 and boasts 799 HP. This supercar combines modern design with classic performance.
articles.impact: This supercar targets high-end automotive enthusiasts.

articles.title: Intel's Arc G3 Gaming Handhelds Announced
articles.description: Intel has officially launched its Arc G3 chipsets for gaming handhelds, debuting with Acer's Predator Atlas 8 and OneXPlayer 3. These devices promise powerful performance.
articles.impact: Intel's entry boosts competition in handheld gaming.

articles.title: One UI 9 Watch Beta Launch Imminent
articles.description: Samsung is preparing to launch the One UI 9 Watch beta, featuring smarter AI and health upgrades. This follows nearly a year after One UI 8 Watch's debut.
articles.impact: This update enhances Samsung's smartwatch capabilities.

articles.title: Turning Off Phone Notifications: A Week's Experience
articles.description: A week without phone notifications revealed how much attention was consumed by apps and alerts. The silence was surprisingly refreshing.
key_points: Notifications turned off for a week
articles.impact: This experiment highlights the need for digital balance.

articles.title: Key Factors for Tipping Food Delivery Drivers
articles.description: A food delivery driver shares insights on tipping, emphasizing two main factors that should influence gratuity. Prudie's advice sparks discussion.
articles.impact: This advice aims to improve tipping practices.
